title: Natural remedies for four common pet problems
description: KAROO NEWS - While a visit to the vet is...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KAROO NEWS - While a visit to the vet is always essential if you’re worried about your pet’s health, there are also several gentle, natural remedies you can try at home to support your furry companion’s everyday wellbeing.","html":"KAROO NEWS - While a visit to the vet is always essential if you’re worried about your pet’s health, there are also several gentle, natural remedies you can try at home to support your furry companion’s everyday wellbeing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Here are four common health issues and natural ways to help soothe them:","html":"Here are four common health issues and natural ways to help soothe them:"},{"type":"heading","text":"Skin & itch relief","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Scratching, scooting, or flaky hot spots? Start with simple, soothing steps:","html":"Scratching, scooting, or flaky hot spots? Start with simple, soothing steps:"},{"type":"list","items":["Gentle bath routine: Choose a mild, fragrance-safe oatmeal or hypoallergenic shampoo to ease itching.","Topical comfort: After drying, spritz a calming skin-soothing spray to nourish irritated areas.","Inside-out support: Add an Omega-3 supplement to promote a healthy coat and skin barrier."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tip: Consistency matters. Repeat gentle baths weekly at first, keep bedding clean, and log changes for 2–3 weeks to spot improvements.","html":"Tip: Consistency matters. Repeat gentle baths weekly at first, keep bedding clean, and log changes for 2–3 weeks to spot improvements."},{"type":"heading","text":"Bladder & urinary comfort","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Frequent urination, straining, or accidents may signal urinary discomfort. Partner with your vet and add supportive steps:","html":"Frequent urination, straining, or accidents may signal urinary discomfort. Partner with your vet and add supportive steps:"},{"type":"list","items":["Offer fresh filtered water often – consider a pet fountain for cats to encourage drinking.","Explore urinary support food or supplements for dogs and cats to help soothe the tract.","Keep your cat’s litter box extra clean and reduce stress with calming pheromone diffusers."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Seek vet care immediately for blood in urine, repeated accidents, or pain.","html":"Seek vet care immediately for blood in urine, repeated accidents, or pain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo: Unsplash","html":"Photo: Unsplash"},{"type":"heading","text":"Joints, hips & mobility","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If your dog hesitates on stairs or seems stiff after naps, think gentle movement plus joint support:","html":"If your dog hesitates on stairs or seems stiff after naps, think gentle movement plus joint support:"},{"type":"list","items":["Short, regular walks keep joints moving without strain.","Browse joint support options and look out for ingredients such as glucosamine, chondroitin, green-lipped mussel.","A plush orthopaedic bed reduces pressure on hips and elbows."],"ordered":false},{"type":"heading","text":"Fleas, ticks & ear comfort","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Many “mystery itches” trace back to external irritants. Keep a simple defence plan:","html":"Many “mystery itches” trace back to external irritants. Keep a simple defence plan:"},{"type":"list","items":["Choose a vet-recommended flea & tick treatment suited to your pet’s weight and age.","Regularly check and gently clean your pet’s ears with a pet-safe ear cleaner,  especially for floppy-eared breeds.","Home hygiene: Wash bedding hot, vacuum frequently, and treat hotspots like car seats and sofas."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton Network News","html":"Article: Caxton Network News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
